    Homepage

    Welcome to my homepage.

    🙋 About Me

    I am Huarui Zhang now studing for Mphil in HKUST(GZ).

    My research interests include Humanoid Robot Loco-Manipulation, VLA and World Model.

    🏆 Awards

    • National First Prize(Third Place) of the 2022 China Robot Competition(RoboCup).
    • National Second Prize of the 2002 China Robot Competition(RoboCup).
    • National First Prize of the 2023 China Undergraduate Computer Design Contest

    🎓 Educations

    • Bachelor, Central China Normal University, 2020-2024
    • Mphil, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology(GuangZhou), 2025-2027

    💼 Internships

    • Machine Vision Engineer at Biel Crystal DataLab. (2024.07-2025.06)
    • Embodied AI Algorithm Intern at AIRS. (2026.01-2026.03)
    • Assistant Algorithm Engineer at Vivo Robot Lab. (2026.03-present)
